raw:
{
  "judge_id": "Judge-1",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.5", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 4,
    "R1.5": 2,
    "RX.1": 1,
    "RX.3": 3,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "Identifies the main concept (developing a training procedure for BI-RADS classifiers) and proposes reframing to address reader disagreement, but does not show where the draft drifts from this core concept or provide evidence that the proposed reframing survives prior-work contrast.",
    "R1.5": "Suggests reorganization by proposing a section plan (problem statement, method description, experimental setup, results, ablations, conclusion) but does not provide per-section rationale.",
    "RX.1": "All output presented as equally confident; no uncertainty disclosure.",
    "RX.3": "Mostly within scope with one drift (the section discusses CSAW-CC split without specifying whether it is the training or evaluation set)",
    "RX.4": "No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original (under-specification of the method and missing ablations)",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason"
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.8,
    "R1.5": 0.7,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.8,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.7
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: Identifies the main concept (developing a training procedure for BI-RADS classifiers) and proposes reframing to address reader disagreement, but does not show where the draft drifts from this core concept or provide evidence that the proposed reframing survives prior-work contrast.
rationale.R1.5: Suggests reorganization by proposing a section plan (problem statement, method description, experimental setup, results, ablations, conclusion) but does not provide per-section rationale.
rationale.RX.1: All output presented as equally confident; no uncertainty disclosure.
rationale.RX.3: Mostly within scope with one drift (the section discusses CSAW-CC split without specifying whether it is the training or evaluation set)
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original (under-specification of the method and missing ablations)
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason
